articles.lead_en: The “humanitarian support” initiative allows citizens of the U.S., the EU and several other countries to apply for special visas if they oppose what Moscow characterizes as the “destructive neoliberal ideological agenda” in their home nations.

articles.title_en: G7 agrees to step up weapons deliveries to Ukraine and increase pressure on Russia’s economy
articles.lead_en: G7 leaders agreed at their summit in France to step up weapons deliveries to Ukraine and intensify pressure on Russia’s military economy, according to a joint statement issued by the countries.
